summary: Added 11 hand-coded novel commands per the Phase 1.5 absorb manifest: batch geocode, resolve, nearest, convert (rd-to-ll / ll-to-rd / wkt-to-geojson / geojson-to-wkt), gemeente (get / list / of-point), provincie list, search (FTS over cache; the generic search command shares this), features search, top, perceel lookup.
reason: These were the user-approved transcendence features from Phase 1.5. None of the existing community wrappers (foarsitter/locatieserver, Amsterdam/pdok-api-client, uRosConf/nlgeocoder, oldgeogap/angular-locatieserver-geocoder) ships a batch geocode loop, suggest+lookup chain, multi-source nearest reverse geocode, RD↔WGS84 math, WKT↔GeoJSON conversion, offline gemeente gazetteer, kadastrale-aanduiding parser, or bbox-multi-collection CSV dump. Each command is ~50–150 LoC plus root.go wiring; collectively ~1100 LoC across 9 new files.
validated_outcome: All 11 commands verified live: convert math round-trips to <0.5m precision; resolve returns canonical record with WKT→GeoJSON conversion; nearest returns address+parcel+hectometerpaal+weg+gemeente in one call; gemeente get reads from cached gazetteer (342 gemeenten); batch geocode processes a CSV with cached lookups. Phase 5 full dogfood 128/128 mandatory tests passing.
